title: rubus crassus
intro: Rubus crassus, also known as the rough-stemmed bramble or thorny raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Rubus crassus include its ability to aid in the healing of wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rubus crassus is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and can be used topically to treat various skin conditions and injuries.
